add_server.title: Add Server
add_server.not_chatto_server: This does not appear to be a Chatto server.
add_server.oauth_unsupported: This server does not support OAuth authentication. It may need to be updated.
add_server.connection_timed_out: Connection timed out. Check the URL and try again.
add_server.connection_failed: Could not connect. Check the URL and ensure CORS is configured.
add_server.description_url: Chatto is distributed - your client connects to each server directly. Enter a URL to add another.
add_server.description_preview: You're about to sign in on this server. You'll be sent to its sign-in page to authenticate.
